name: ZephyrForNY.com
subject: Make a plan to vote on Thursday!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zephyr for NY
body:
When will you go? How will you get there?
#

Peter -
In a close race like ours, every vote matters. So we want to make sure that all of our supporters, including you, have a plan to vote on Thursday.
Research shows time and again that people are more likely to vote if they make a plan to vote. Have you made yours?
**[First, click here to confirm that you are registered to vote and find out where your polling location is.](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d78097e/6e822e2f/1d489e45/4173b9c0/733079095/VEsH/ "https://voterlookup.elections.ny.gov/")**
[FIND YOUR POLLING LOCATION](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d78097e/6e822e2f/1d489e45/4173b9c0/733079095/VEsE/ "https://voterlookup.elections.ny.gov/")
Got it? Know where you need to go?
**Great, now you just need to make a plan to get there. What time will you go? How will you get there? Will you take someone with you to vote for Zephyr?**
Share your plan to vote on social media or forward this email to a friend and ask them to join you. (Professor Teachout says going with others is always an A+ plan!)
Thanks for making a plan to vote for Zephyr on Thursday. If we're in this together, then we will win.
All our best,
Team Zephyr
[FIND YOUR POLLING LOCATION](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d78097e/6e822e2f/1d489e45/4173b9c0/733079095/VEsF/ "https://voterlookup.elections.ny.gov/")

* * *
Paid for by Zephyr for NY
---
1789 Madison Ave, New York, NY 10035

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Click [here](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d78097e/6e822e2f/1d489e45/4173b9c1/733079095/VEsC/ "http://zephyr.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/") if you'd like to unsubscribe. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email. To support Zephyr with a contribution, click [here](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d78097e/6e822e2f/1d489e45/4173b9c2/733079095/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-for-ny?refcode=em_footer").

name: Molly Kelly
subject: it's official
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Supporters of Molly Kelly
body:
| | |
---
The results are in, friends, and I'm honored to be the official Democratic nominee for governor of New Hampshire!
I want to say thank you to you and the rest of this grassroots team, because there's no way I'd be here without your generous support.
_**But now the real work begins.**_ Governor Chris Sununu's campaign has money pouring in from corporate backers who want to keep pushing their agenda in the Granite State. But there are just 56 days until Election Day, and since I'm not accepting any corporate special interest money, your support now is more important than ever.
**We 've set a goal to raise $10,000 in grassroots donations before midnight tonight. I'm counting on you to give $5 or more right now to flip New Hampshire blue and finally put working families above special interests.**
**[_Please, give $5 or more right now to help me defeat Sununu in November and take back the corner office for Democrats._](https://mollykelly.bsd.net/page/m/70fc4970/d0ce7de/51cec61b/9cd61d2/3700506589/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2VsbHlmb3Jnb3Zlcm5vcmVtYWlscyIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMTEyLWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kellyforgovernoremails?refcode=jtk112-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Let's go win this,

Molly

name: Wendy H. [Press Secretary]
subject: Did you hear what Amy's opponent said?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Klobuchar for Minnesota
body:
Hi,
Did you hear what Amy's opponent said at their last debate?

I'll cut right to the chase. On the debate stage he said:
> _**" Do I believe climate change is man-made? No, I do not. Climate change, the number one factor in climate change is the sun. And we cannot change how the sun operates." \-- Amy's opponent at their last debate**_
And when he was asked in a recent candidate questionnaire, "Do you believe in climate change?" his answer was just one word: **" No."**

This isn't just an extreme view, it's against science.

**If you think science matters when it comes to climate change -- speak up by making a grassroots donation today.**

_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $15>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=vGf3UsoR7AT1F6vgk85mUI%2F87ucdtNLA)**
**[Express donate $25>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=x1lKZs7Jy4NEaSTQtFrYG4%2F87ucdtNLA)**
**[Express donate $50>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=CCs9qBL1JD7cv6E%2BVvZSZY%2F87ucdtNLA)**
**[Express donate $100>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=9E0mNIPiYoguzbu2nBnB64%2F87ucdtNLA)**
****[Or, donate a different amount>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=95BuC0CYd1zv%2Bous7K9YYo%2F87ucdtNLA)****
It's pretty simple: Amy thinks we've got to follow the facts and follow the science. She knows climate change is impacting our world and we've got to do something about it.

Senator Klobuchar opposes the Administration's rollback of the Clean Power Plan and supports the international climate agreement. As a member of the Senate Climate Action Taskforce she's called for a comprehensive approach to reduce greenhouse gas emissions and promote homegrown energy. And in the Senate, she's opposed Trump Administration nominees who deny climate change is occurring.

When you look at the facts, you know we need to combat climate change to protect our future. Unlike her opponent, Amy is going to do something about it. [ **Tell Amy you 've got her back with a contribution to our campaign today.**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=WeNFKcadmhRWhSlcz%2FioII%2F87ucdtNLA)

\-- Wendy

P.S. Did you know that the Senate voted 98-1 for a resolution that said climate change is real and not a hoax? [**Donate today to say loud and clear: I believe in science. I believe in action to reduce greenhouse gases. And I believe in Amy.**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=VnfHY359w0RQ3hIVNJ3ioo%2F87ucdtNLA)

**[Contribute](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=Sp4Q%2F6QxNNF60BoPfxxVWY%2F87ucdtNLA)**

[](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=vgEODbvRMQoxQ5t%2F1Tcr8o%2F87ucdtNLA)
---

name: Bob Corney, Bredesen 2018
subject: Governor Bredesen writes all the ads himself
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bredesen for Senate
body:
| Peter, I wanted to say something real quick about Governor Bredesen’s message from yesterday (read it below). When we first started talking about TV ads back in January, the political consultants wanted to run flashy, highly produced ads. For example, if we’re talking about health care, there’s stock video of a nurse talking to a little kid with poll-tested soundbites. But Governor Bredesen said, “Wait a minute,” because that’s not how he wanted to run this campaign. He doesn’t want to feed voters the same slogans they hear from every politician out of the Washington establishment every two years. **He wants to talk to Tennesseans directly about the issues that matter to them. That’s why he doesn’t let anyone write these ads for him -- he writes them himself.** And we need your help so he can keep reaching more voters directly here in Tennessee -- **so can he count on you to you add a donation of $10 or more before tonight's deadline?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 Now →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2165596/11208490/-1190505252?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzZmODMwMi05MmI2LWU4MTEtYmNlNy0wMDBkM2ExMmI3ZTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PfnRyGgfOw5x1ussGQmQ0h09Q2eWxNqc3eCCd6brPak=&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em180912-attacks-4-express-10&amounts=5,15,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=Peter&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Lebanon&state=TN&zip=37087&phone=&employer=&occupation=)

Thanks for your help,
Bob Corney

Peter --
In a moment, I’m going to ask again for your help getting my campaign’s positive message in front of Tennessee voters. But first, I want to explain how that message is coming together.
Over the course of this campaign, I’ll have the chance to run roughly 18 TV ads, plus or minus two -- **thanks to the donations we raise from grassroots supporters like you.** These ads are 30 seconds long, with really just 26 seconds of audio -- that leaves me with about 72 words.
That’s why, when I think about what kind of message we’re putting in front of voters, we’ve got 18 chances to say 72 words to the people of Tennessee.
**Can you chip in $10 or more to help us make these 18 chances count? We have a fundraising deadline coming up tomorrow, and your support is going to be critical to meeting our grassroots goal ahead of a new round of attacks from my opponent.**

clean_body: | Peter, I wanted to say something real quick about Governor Bredesen’s message from yesterday (read it below). When we first started talking about TV ads back in January, the political consultants wanted to run flashy, highly produced ads. For example, if we’re talking about health care, there’s stock video of a nurse talking to a little kid with poll-tested soundbites. But Governor Bredesen said, “Wait a minute,” because that’s not how he wanted to run this campaign. He doesn’t want to feed voters the same slogans they hear from every politician out of the Washington establishment every two years. He wants to talk to Tennesseans directly about the issues that matter to them. That’s why he doesn’t let anyone write these ads for him -- he writes them himself. And we need your help so he can keep reaching more voters directly here in Tennessee -- so can he count on you to you add a donation of $10 or more before tonight's deadline? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks for your help, Bob Corney Campaign Manager Bredesen for Senate Peter -- In a moment, I’m going to ask again for your help getting my campaign’s positive message in front of Tennessee voters. But first, I want to explain how that message is coming together. Over the course of this campaign, I’ll have the chance to run roughly 18 TV ads, plus or minus two -- thanks to the donations we raise from grassroots supporters like you. These ads are 30 seconds long, with really just 26 seconds of audio -- that leaves me with about 72 words. That’s why, when I think about what kind of message we’re putting in front of voters, we’ve got 18 chances to say 72 words to the people of Tennessee. Can you chip in $10 or more to help us make these 18 chances count? We have a fundraising deadline coming up tomorrow, and your support is going to be critical to meeting our grassroots goal ahead of a new round of attacks from my opponent.** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks for being on my team, —Phil Bredesen Paid for by Bredesen for Senate Bredesen for Senate P.O. Box 92010 Nashville, TN 37209 United States

subject: Small Business Optimism Surges to Highest Level Ever, Topping Previous Record Under Reagan
body:
| |
---
#
# _Small Business Optimism Surges to Highest Level Ever, Topping Previous Record Under Reagan_
“U.S. small business optimism surged to a record in August as the tax cuts and deregulation efforts of President Donald Trump and the Republican-led Congress led to more sales, hiring and investment, according to a survey by the National Federation of Independent Business,” John Melloy reports for CNBC. “Small businesses have been a key beneficiary of Trump’s economic plans.” [**Click here to read more.**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTEyLjk0Nzg3MjcxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkxMi45NDc4NzI3MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg1MTQ2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/cnbc-small-business-optimism-surges-highest-level-ever-topping-previous-record-reagan/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=wwr) “President Trump observed the anniversary of Sept. 11 at a memorial service Tuesday in Shanksville, Pa., where he praised the ‘spirit’ of the 40 passengers and crew members who died trying to stop hijackers from redirecting Flight 93 toward Washington that fateful day,” Gabby Morrongiello writes in the **[_Washington Examiner_](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTEyLjk0Nzg3MjcxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkxMi45NDc4NzI3MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg1MTQ2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://www.washingtonexaminer.com/news/white-house/trump-marks-9-11-anniversary-at-flight-93-memorial-a-piece-of-americas-heart-is-buried-on-these-grounds).** “The number of job openings in the U.S. climbed to a record 6.94 million in July in a clear sign that a booming economy is entering the second half of the year with a big dollop of momentum,” Jeffry Bartash reports in [**_MarketWatch_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTEyLjk0Nzg3MjcxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkxMi45NDc4NzI3MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg1MTQ2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/marketwatch-u-s-job-openings-climb-record-6-9-million/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=wwr). “Workers who switch jobs usually get better pay than those who remain in their old ones. And more people switch when they are confident about the economy.” In [**_The Daily Signal_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTEyLjk0Nzg3MjcxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkxMi45NDc4NzI3MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg1MTQ2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&https://www.dailysignal.com/2018/09/10/bolton-is-right-to-repudiate-international-criminal-courts-jurisdiction-over-us-military-government-officials/), foreign policy expert Brett Schaefer writes that National Security Advisor John Bolton took the right stance by repudiating the unaccountable International Criminal Court. “It is appropriate and necessary for the Trump administration to take steps to place our military personnel, our government officials, and our national interests above the interests of an international court whose jurisdiction the U.S. has never acknowledged.” “September 11 should not be about politics, nor about Donald Trump, and surely not about Joe Scarborough,” Steve Cortes writes in [**_RealClearPolitics_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTEyLjk0Nzg3MjcxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkxMi45NDc4NzI3MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg1MTQ2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&104&&&https://www.realclearpolitics.com/articles/2018/09/11/joe_scarborough_hypocrite_138043.html). “But MSNBC’s ‘Morning Joe’ callously used the calamity of 9/11 to take cheap political shots at President Trump . . . Scarborough should apologize for denigrating our national day of remembrance.”
[Privacy Policy](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTEyLjk0Nzg3MjcxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkxMi45NDc4NzI3MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg1MTQ2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&105&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/privacy-policy/) | [Contact the White House](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTEyLjk0Nzg3MjcxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkxMi45NDc4NzI3MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg1MTQ2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&106&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/contact) | [Unsubscribe](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTEyLjk0Nzg3MjcxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkxMi45NDc4NzI3MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg1MTQ2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&107&&&https://messages.whitehouse.gov/accounts/USWH/subscriber/unsubscribe_from_topic?verification=5.de26655797f4bb6f464a5bb6e5436a0f&destination=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&topic_id=USWH_1)

name: Christina Amestoy, Steve Sisolak for Governor
subject: Imagine
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY FRIENDS FOR STEVE SISOLAK
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/Gk-gG2PMYYksRX5qGcLtCzAzkeZFw-jwrJJUGSq-n6c=/ZwnmnEKRLTG0CparcRLhN3fAIjQl2uuM6XFGS9Z5LUM=?gpsid=37_57_3538&refcode=em18_180912_dream_LG_fnd_gq_act__CA_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180912_dream_LG_fnd_gq_act__CA_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso&recur_weekly=yes)
---

Dear Friend,

Close your eyes for a second and imagine something with me:

It's four years from today. Hundreds of thousands of Nevadans with pre-existing health conditions are getting the care they need at a cost that doesn't literally bankrupt their families. Educators in our state are getting paid what they deserve and class sizes are shrinking. And thousands of Nevadans are earning steady wages working new jobs in manufacturing and clean energy.

This doesn't have to be a dream -- it's completely possible if supporters like you help Steve Sisolak defeat Adam Laxalt.

**[Will you help Steve Sisolak pull ahead as we get closer to the finish line by making a recurring donation? Click here to become a weekly donor until November 6th.](https://act.myngp.com/el/Gk-gG2PMYYksRX5qGcLtCzAzkeZFw-jwrJJUGSq-n6c=/ZwnmnEKRLTG0CparcRLhN3fAIjQl2uuM6XFGS9Z5LUM=?gpsid=37_57_3538&refcode=em18_180912_dream_L1_fnd_gq_act__CA_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180912_dream_L1_fnd_gq_act__CA_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso&recur_weekly=yes)**

Steve is running to build a brighter future for Nevada -- one that's fairer for working people. Lackey Laxalt has already proven as attorney general that he's beholden to special interests and isn't listening to Nevadans.

Now that the mega-rich corporate bidders see he'll scratch their backs, they're going to bat for him -- big time. There are reports that Laxalt is the biggest beneficiary of Koch network money _in the country_ this election cycle.

**[We can't let special interests ruin Nevada's future. Become a weekly donor to sustain this campaign through Election Day on November 6th.](https://act.myngp.com/el/Gk-gG2PMYYksRX5qGcLtCzAzkeZFw-jwrJJUGSq-n6c=/ZwnmnEKRLTG0CparcRLhN3fAIjQl2uuM6XFGS9Z5LUM=?gpsid=37_57_3538&refcode=em18_180912_dream_L2_fnd_gq_act__CA_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180912_dream_L2_fnd_gq_act__CA_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso&recur_weekly=yes)**

Thanks,

Christina Amestoy
Communications Director
Steve Sisolak for Governor

[DONATE WEEKLY](https://act.myngp.com/el/Gk-gG2PMYYksRX5qGcLtCzAzkeZFw-jwrJJUGSq-n6c=/ZwnmnEKRLTG0CparcRLhN3fAIjQl2uuM6XFGS9Z5LUM=?gpsid=37_57_3538&refcode=em18_180912_dream_B1_fnd_gq_act__CA_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180912_dream_B1_fnd_gq_act__CA_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso&recur_weekly=yes)

name: Jeanne Shaheen
subject: Two pro-choice candidates we need
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shaheen for Senate
body:
| | |
---
Friends - Democrats need just _two seats_ to take back the Senate and protect affordable health care, women's rights and the future of the Supreme Court.

**The Washington Post says Nevada and Arizona are Democrats' best chances to flip GOP Senate seats in November, but the latest polls show my friends Jacky Rosen and Kyrsten Sinema neck and neck with their GOP opponents - and POLITICO just called both races _toss-ups._**

With the full force of Donald Trump and the GOP against them, I know from personal experience that Jacky and Kyrsten can only win with immediate grassroots support.

So I told them we'd help them raise another $20,000 by midnight tonight to help take back the Senate. **But we're falling short, Friends, and running out of time - so I'm counting on you to step up now: [Will you donate $5 before midnight to help Jacky Rosen and Kyrsten Sinema flip Nevada and Arizona blue in November, so we can take back the Senate for Democrats?](http://www.democratsenators.org/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=ltqATRcIh2NEQg1GPlaJyUwBG4ggStd8&url=https%3A%2F%2Femilyslist.org%2Fbundle%2Fturn-the-senate-blue%3Fsource%3Dshaheen)**
| | [Contribute](http://www.democratsenators.org/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=huP0fZxy8DiqfyzV3OLWSIStm7WJpZhS&url=https%3A%2F%2Femilyslist.org%2Fbundle%2Fturn-the-senate-blue%3Fsource%3Dshaheen)
---
Thank you for standing up for these inspiring women.

Jeanne

clean_body: | | | Friends - Democrats need just two seats to take back the Senate and protect affordable health care, women's rights and the future of the Supreme Court. The Washington Post says Nevada and Arizona are Democrats' best chances to flip GOP Senate seats in November, but the latest polls show my friends Jacky Rosen and Kyrsten Sinema neck and neck with their GOP opponents - and POLITICO just called both races toss-ups. With the full force of Donald Trump and the GOP against them, I know from personal experience that Jacky and Kyrsten can only win with immediate grassroots support. So I told them we'd help them raise another $20,000 by midnight tonight to help take back the Senate. But we're falling short, Friends, and running out of time - so I'm counting on you to step up now: | | Thank you for standing up for these inspiring women. Jeanne | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. | | Paid for by Shaheen for Senate Contributions or gifts to Shaheen for Senate are not tax deductible.

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: vote today!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Gina Raimondo
body:
Hi friend,
Today's the day -- the Rhode Island Democratic Primary. It's already been an intense race, and a lot of people are going to be voting today. **It 's going to be close, and your vote could make the difference.**
**Today, I am respectfully asking for your support** so we can continue making the changes we need in Rhode Island. We've come too far to go backwards -- **can you make your way to a polling location and vote before 8pm?**
Secondly, **[can you please click here and register for a Get Out The Vote shift?](https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/m/1f41a012/5e076a9e/54e485f7/14425858/1275432895/VEsH/ "https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/mEcDw6aHXUmfoljzf16Hbg2")** Talking to other voters and getting them to their polling locations is critical to keeping our progress going.
If you have any questions about where you vote or what you need to bring to the polls, our voter protection team is standing by. Please give them a call at 401-298-5851.
Together, we will keep Rhode Island moving forward.
Gina

\-------
###### Paid for by Friends of Gina Raimondo. This email is not intended for any Rhode Island state government employees. If you are a Rhode Island state government employee, please disregard and let us know so we can unsubscribe you from future emails. Per Rhode Island State Law, individuals may contribute a maximum of $1,000 per year. Business and corporate checks are prohibited.

When we launched this campaign, the political pundits didn’t think a Senate race in Tennessee would be much of a contest. They dismissed the idea that a campaign focused on bringing people together could win out over a DC politician supported by out-of-state billionaires and the Washington establishment.
**We are proving them wrong every single day -- and momentum is on our side.**
Voters on the campaign trail have made it clear what they’re looking for: a leader who is able to bring people together to get things done, and has the record to prove it.
To win in November, we’ve got to keep putting our positive message in front of voters: by opening field offices, knocking on doors, making calls, and airing TV ads that allow Governor Bredesen to speak directly with Tennesseans. Your support is key to getting it done -- that’s why I have to ask:
**Can you chip in $10 or whatever you can today so we have the resources we need to keep this race focused on the issues that matter to Tennesseans? Your support is a big part of why we’re doing so well and will be critical to keeping this up until Election Day.**

name: West Virginia Democratic Party
subject: Take a minute to read
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by the WV State Democratic Executive Committee (www
body:
Fellow Democrat,

The national media has confirmed what West Virginians have known all along: Joe Manchin is well liked and trusted by people in the Mountain State, and Patrick Morrisey's baggage is weighing him down so badly that Republicans are souring on the Morrisey campaign.

**[Take a minute to read this story from the Washington Examiner.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2169764/11229123/1858637976?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzgyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjMyODZhZS1iMGI2LWU4MTEtYmNlNy0wMDBkM2ExMmI3ZTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mNtEQ9EoklTcfS1q5QtPMpC15uLXRLHbKekVYSahb-Y=)**

\---
# **[Top Republicans lower expectations in West Virginia as Joe Manchin proves formidable](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2169765/11229124/1858637976?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzgyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjMyODZhZS1iMGI2LWU4MTEtYmNlNy0wMDBkM2ExMmI3ZTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mNtEQ9EoklTcfS1q5QtPMpC15uLXRLHbKekVYSahb-Y=)**
by David M. Drucker
Washington Examiner, September 12, 2018

**HIGHLIGHTS:**

\--Top Republicans are lowering expectations in West Virginia, where GOP Senate nominee state Attorney General Patrick Morrisey is struggling against Democratic Sen. Joe Manchin.
\--Morrisey isn’t capitalizing on President Trump’s popularity in the Appalachian battleground. His New Jersey roots and stint as a Washington lobbyist, although not a hindrance in two campaigns for attorney general, aren’t playing well versus Manchin.
\-- The former governor is affectionately known at home as “Joe,” a relationship worth a lot of votes in targeted, top-of-the-ticket contests like this.
\---Morrisey, with limited resources, hasn’t raised enough to finance the sort of positive, biographical advertising that might recast his image and put a dent in Manchin’s crucial likability advantage.

[Read the full story here. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2169766/11229125/1858637976?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzgyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjMyODZhZS1iMGI2LWU4MTEtYmNlNy0wMDBkM2ExMmI3ZTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mNtEQ9EoklTcfS1q5QtPMpC15uLXRLHbKekVYSahb-Y=)

clean_body: Fellow Democrat, The national media has confirmed what West Virginians have known all along: Joe Manchin is well liked and trusted by people in the Mountain State, and Patrick Morrisey's baggage is weighing him down so badly that Republicans are souring on the Morrisey campaign. = \--- = by David M. Drucker Washington Examiner, September 12, 2018 HIGHLIGHTS: \--Top Republicans are lowering expectations in West Virginia, where GOP Senate nominee state Attorney General Patrick Morrisey is struggling against Democratic Sen. Joe Manchin. \--Morrisey isn’t capitalizing on President Trump’s popularity in the Appalachian battleground. His New Jersey roots and stint as a Washington lobbyist, although not a hindrance in two campaigns for attorney general, aren’t playing well versus Manchin. \-- The former governor is affectionately known at home as “Joe,” a relationship worth a lot of votes in targeted, top-of-the-ticket contests like this. \---Morrisey, with limited resources, hasn’t raised enough to finance the sort of positive, biographical advertising that might recast his image and put a dent in Manchin’s crucial likability advantage. = Paid for and authorized by the WV State Democratic Executive Committee (www.wvdems.org). Peter, **I spent Monday and Tuesday in Washington, DC, meeting with national organizations, labor unions, and Democratic committees, and the news is promising! **A number of big organizations are getting ready to jump in and support my campaign. Both the Democratic National Committee (DNC) and the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee (DCCC) shared their enthusiasm for what we are doing here in the Texas 10th. **And the American Federation of State, County and Municipal Employees (AFSCME) gave me their national union's endorsement and financial support as soon as we met!** **[Keep the momentum going by chipping in $20 or more today](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2169813/11229456/-2058851995?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMmRjNWFmYi1iMmI2LWU4MTEtYmNlNy0wMDBkM2ExMmI3ZTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yh3GxqWWv8Ui_bzmPw4VGyxvwyIKdSJwWf5yZArTGiM=).** This campaign started in the most grassroots way possible, with 42 volunteers petitioning to get my name on the ballot. We finished first in a primary of seven Democratic candidates and won a runoff with 70% of the vote. Now, **we have a poll showing I am in a virtual tie** with the seven-time Republican incumbent, and **some of the most powerful Democratic organizations are getting ready to put their should to the wheel**.
_I met with Reggie Hubbard of MoveOn.org, one of our national supporters_ **We can keep the momentum going by continuing to contact voters and raise money.** The national groups need to know that we are doing everything we can to take back the House and restore democratic values to this country. **[Please donate today to show the country that we are ready to flip the Texas 10th](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2169814/11229457/-2058851995?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMmRjNWFmYi1iMmI2LWU4MTEtYmNlNy0wMDBkM2ExMmI3ZTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yh3GxqWWv8Ui_bzmPw4VGyxvwyIKdSJwWf5yZArTGiM=)**. And please **[consider volunteering](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2169815/11229458/946621143?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMmRjNWFmYi1iMmI2LWU4MTEtYmNlNy0wMDBkM2ExMmI3ZTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yh3GxqWWv8Ui_bzmPw4VGyxvwyIKdSJwWf5yZArTGiM=)** to call Texas voters or assist with our canvassing efforts. Thank you for your continued participation in this work. The nation is counting on us! With respect,
Mike

name: Governor Phil Murphy
subject: Trust me, you can't take this risk
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
Just ask someone from New Jersey.

| [](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37ba0b/7ab0e2c4/7e2768ff/34988d4f/2179453470/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-gov-murphy?refcode=OHQ09128A") Friend, Believe it or not, New Jersey and Maryland aren't _that_ different. At least in one big way: Registered Democrats outnumber registered Republicans by a 2-to-1 margin, but we trusted a so-called "moderate" Republican to lead our states. I was sworn into office as New Jersey's newest governor in January succeeding Chris Christie, who -- like Maryland's governor -- once had a high approval rating and seemed to have nowhere to go but up. When I took over, his approval rating was just 14%. **The one thing I know is that in this day and age, you simply can't depend on Republicans to keep their word to their residents -- they're the party of Trump, plain and simple.** [**That's why I know we have to take Maryland back now and elect Ben Jealous. If you agree, join me and make a donation of $5 or more right now.**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37ba0b/7ab0e2c4/7e2768ff/34988d4f/2179453470/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-gov-murphy?refcode=OHQ09128A") _Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_ | | [**$5 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37ba0b/7ab0e2c4/7e2768ff/34988d4e/2179453470/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-gov-murphy?refcode=OHQ09128A&amount=5&express_lane=true")

---
| | [**$100 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37ba0b/7ab0e2c4/7e2768ff/34988d4b/2179453470/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-gov-murphy?refcode=OHQ09128A&amount=100&express_lane=true")
---
| [**$250 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37ba0b/7ab0e2c4/7e2768ff/34988d4a/2179453470/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-gov-murphy?refcode=OHQ09128A&amount=250&express_lane=true")
---
| | [**OTHER »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37ba0b/7ab0e2c4/7e2768ff/34988db5/2179453470/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-gov-murphy?refcode=OHQ09128A&express_lane=true")
---
I can tell you why Ben's platform will work for Maryland -- because a lot of it is already working in New Jersey.
In my first 100 days in office this year, we worked hard to pass bills requiring equal pay for equal work for women, we've restored $7.5 million in funding back to family planning centers like Planned Parenthood, and we've appointed the most diverse cabinet in state history. Representation matters -- and my constituents know it.
And like Ben, I know that legalizing and taxing marijuana makes smart fiscal and policy sense in New Jersey just like it will in Maryland -- because we need big, bold ideas to make our states better for working families.
Governor Hogan wants you to believe that Ben is "too risky". But if you ask someone from New Jersey, they'll tell you that you can't afford to take a risk like they did -- giving their so-called "moderate Republican" governor, Chris Christie, a second term.
Right now, in this crazy political moment in history, we need leaders who have proven that they will stand up for their constituents, and stand up against hatred and divisiveness. If your leaders aren't doing that basic thing, then what are they doing?
[**I know the answer: Not enough. That's why we need to elect Ben Jealous as Maryland's next governor. Join me and make a donation of $5 or more today.**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37ba0b/7ab0e2c4/7e2768ff/34988d4f/2179453470/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-gov-murphy?refcode=OHQ09128A")
Thanks,
Phil Murphy
Governor of New Jersey

name: MARCY KAPTUR and TIM RYAN
subject: Stop Trump from taking a pay raise from hard working people
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaptur for Congress P
body:
| | | **[TAKE ACTION: Tell President Trump to reverse his attack on workers and give federal workers the pay raise they negotiated and earned](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mpss/c/BAE/ni0YAA/t.2kt/zta6UWn4SZmjmbTIcs1kwQ/h0/WQ-2BlIwq7W2eCmkkcwbDiBbZZ8k6zBVQtuO7myuMWelmhxtGy-2FUgEpOqIXqBycTI-2FJQ2enYeDaCrU634YuopuycXHaIk1ZOSqBhXN9VWxF-2Bfgf4kEqKUJWxPZC0Tst5Y7DEVp-2BpbMXzwmyv0OXXJZ9gWQ7DCVbH3cC-2BIBlXWyDQWhMayXM3f8aVf5x-2B-2BL2QLb0G7tSDk0ivN8Absk9lkUvWurNUOn09tZeFfvoPo-2Fwi05YHgIHLXcgy89qfRzA9B3-2F5jrkPCgIiNHop9aMAPtv-2F3IyNZzwK6D-2FGZxHJgjzMVnmZlvBlBgCz7sYFQzdNamvr25BjGdsWKQWYfYAHhggzAIvfZdaqYpcjN-2Fu6tPyl0FkfK-2BTY1Vbdog-2BRWuG8JAxmS83U2H9APl-2B75zi0-2Fp5HEIkHuJ20uToI5ZPwO0wdA-3D)** **
** Friend, President Trump campaigned on helping working people get ahead and he promised higher paychecks and a fair playing field. And what are we getting instead? A GOP tax giveaway for billionaires and huge corporations. Attacks on Americans’ health care. And now, cancelled pay raises for our civil servants. There are two million federal workers across the country and now they won’t be getting a pay raise because President Donald Trump has vowed to cancel it giving the money away in tax breaks to the wealthiest job exporters he can find. [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mpss/c/BAE/ni0YAA/t.2kt/zta6UWn4SZmjmbTIcs1kwQ/h1/WQ-2BlIwq7W2eCmkkcwbDiBbZZ8k6zBVQtuO7myuMWelmhxtGy-2FUgEpOqIXqBycTI-2FJQ2enYeDaCrU634YuopuycXHaIk1ZOSqBhXN9VWxF-2BcvsQODDU-2BC4-2FQoN2F1JvARPRK4Ivc5h7d1ZHURdUKh0uENLWsz-2FGhyKZLKtQMQ-2F28pF3ld8o1lHw1hdMwoSYKjQLzIU3gl1H3XHFDaac1BlA69H71Dcyt0nClHSX-2By3f-2Fp854nprI-2FzxYjb9LSoeCVmhKcuUkDO5Q8TtZeWdTMgyhM-2BxOCraeW5KeHmU6EsIGBtDAwQMH42mzCK3j0oDAwTzVeAL8qjMhNWvby5ALADfdiB9mSufCPZtvf6P2jy6qks1cqVejJumI11I3Hs-2FXwhGKTEHdbdflqr7-2Bn3EHb3pwBhCqvmv4sG2VfknuPoJA-3D)
You read that right, President Trump is canceling a negotiated and agreed upon pay raise that could help millions of families including the 49,000 federal workers in the state of Ohio. These are the first responders and TSA workers that help keep us safe, the civilian workers who support our military, the worker men and women who help process Social Security and Medicare requests. All workers deserve a chance for a better life and a wage the reflects the rising costs of living. **[We’ll fight this backward move with everything we have in Congress, but we need you to stand with us and tell Trump civil service workers deserve a pay raise.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mpss/c/BAE/ni0YAA/t.2kt/zta6UWn4SZmjmbTIcs1kwQ/h2/WQ-2BlIwq7W2eCmkkcwbDiBbZZ8k6zBVQtuO7myuMWelmhxtGy-2FUgEpOqIXqBycTI-2FJQ2enYeDaCrU634YuopuycXHaIk1ZOSqBhXN9VWxF-2BclyE0a-2Buja5O2JTP22niI9CKf9nrt0a2LMccyWpYYX7BOH3tGXUdnuuXFluDPEgbhFBojiVnjny1JAAuE3tzqwA-2FYydzl7NFZ-2ByXTonM4oRCPNsqY12aAYZ9zrFoOOih9jhnxlmjpzSLSY3VFP4QO36NYiCKVcocp0xzpilEfOvhV6I-2F8poTh3xttBl-2F0lha6g19Qlfn6c6623gl-2FTk-2FwFFpJsZFSRiwacot6bgCUMw03JV5wYDm-2BVfam8XDxYtWcTSxcaTLqNhlztiXFErrD8CIvAGWHMjKZakYZUxKKlo52yRp92Ic-2BP-2FVVoOVf8h8U-3D)**

name: Zephyr Teachout
subject: why I'm asking now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zephyr for NY
body:
Peter -
Our final fundraising drive comes to a close tonight, and I'm so grateful for all of our supporters who have chipped in during this final push.
We've made great progress so far, but we're still a bit short of where we need to be. Every dollar that we get now is being directly invested in our effort to reach the 30% of voters who are still undecided.
We know this race is going to be close, but we have a real chance at winning. Every door knock, every phone call and every dollar is going to matter come tomorrow night.
Despite being outspent by our opponents' corporate-funded war chests, we've surged. And while we have the momentum, we need to fight even harder.
I don't want to wake up the day after the primary asking if we did everything we could have to win, so that's why I'm asking now:
Will you make a $3 donation before midnight? Here's the link where you can do it:
**[https://go.zephyrforny.com/final-push](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d78097d/6e822e2f/1d329e75/4173b884/1759069705/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA5MTItMS1mdWxsIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-september?refcode=em180912-1-full")**
Thanks for everything you've done to support our campaign. I'm so proud of what we've accomplished in such a short amount of time, and I cannot wait to win this race together.
All my best,
Zephyr

name: TimKaine.com
subject: Reject Kavanaugh's nomination
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
Tim will be voting "No." If you agree, sign our petition rejecting Judge Brett Kavanaugh's nomination to the Supreme Court. ----------------------------------------------------------------------------
| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Derek, in the coming weeks, the Senate will be voting on Judge Brett Kavanaugh's _lifetime appointment_ to the Supreme Court.

If appointed, Brett Kavanaugh would be arguably the most pro-presidential-powers justice we have ever had. _Perhaps that is exactly why he was hand-selected by President Trump._

When meeting with Judge Kavanaugh, Tim was not assured that the judge would respect the precedence of critical decisions that so many Americans rely on for their families, their liberties, and their health care options.

[Tim will be voting "No." If you agree, sign our petition rejecting Judge Brett Kavanaugh's nomination to the Supreme Court.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f11c0/3e0906/73ad9ae3/3e3624b7/2145679573/VEsH/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/Kavanaugh?source=20180912_1_PET_TEAM_kavanaugh&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+Tim+will+be+voting+ldquoNordquo+If+you+a&utm_campaign=20180912_1_PET_TEAM_kavanaugh")

name: John Shimkus
subject: the results are in
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Volunteers for Shimkus
body:
All too often, members of Congress head to Washington, D.C. and leave the people they represent behind. They get distracted by the political games....
[](http://links.johnshimkus.com/u/click?_t=eae2f3fb948c4b7f93f466c2a8ab140b&_m=7bf735db062543c38d1f00c8f75615ac&_e=G9fFvZpewetnho40WIX39y71WIdqeZ_O5q0TFhcPderruPgU8wIMX3xwWnJDMQFeX9A5Mst9UZinWiySDhesImLzpzvvHs5zokkkp2wTEJZctVAGC-Mqv-F10a9etlaN9QQlWs-50Czx8qv27DBQqfMveVf2Xc04ua2tfg6UzGDN-J6k1cnWVGlF1JrSnvNKvp0oaHV3VPeQxoVPx78PsUjBmUCgll6me116vKSTgwIL-FpBxQdi7-_c6cWq0d1YR16gsm5rOwEbjWczA5ACpTlDDw4iTC8TBBhV1imrtGM_I_-iz7J4-YbrhcJRTVHnKXCfp0WNnbYF9rGnJMc1bxi5TI1eTFDvBIy_Fi7LrQKST4Oyv9UY7KYBBraW7Ka1MCugERqGYEJTviP2FAYtvw%3D%3D)
Friend,

All too often, members of Congress head to Washington, D.C. and leave the people they represent behind. They get distracted by the political games, the TV cameras, and the allure of the spotlight.

Not me.

My number one priority has always been serving the people of Illinois: listening to and learning from our friends, families, and neighbors. That’s why instead of getting caught up in “the Swamp” of Washington, I’ve kept my finger on the pulse of Illinois.

Back in May, I went straight to the people of Southern Illinois for answers. I surveyed thousands of Illinoisans like yourself, asking about what is most important to you, and where you stand on the most significant issues facing our communities.
[SEE THE SURVEY RESULTS](http://links.johnshimkus.com/u/click?_t=eae2f3fb948c4b7f93f466c2a8ab140b&_m=7bf735db062543c38d1f00c8f75615ac&_e=G9fFvZpewetnho40WIX391lC4k1TqSJwvi6LbLqWw2VQih_ja10IeFFsjwptCgO5uKaT5kE9ENymJEIKJEMjyJZ-IGzv4wnQIh5vHH_veByBPsoR77QNYhJ6PnS8cvN0puNid3-2LtSbY3Ijcn3Yrzt7vp5cpMQv1v7FRX-tQN1DTuDf_TP3j7u9I1wc5rgi-ArnX5ITqYOW4K5t-3Vbx7Pb4miNeOHbwqS00G7KCJ5skmmZEZxEkpRhmN6JJcXZFzhny8rh-60IP-tky6FzDyhhP3VgyDWWyh0zRJRzowgOk9nzk4SMqR7taG3oqXVRypAAz_cwmMpBQO0Z4nQCMiASTi7neGwf1mWpMwS-YTZM9lfywUWL7HfNaMoodegNvELkUFXnFOXRYIU_tl63A69CeI2fQ-jZFNC-HMoN6Fk%3D)
---

Today, I’m happy to invite you to see the results for yourself and learn exactly where Southern Illinois stands. For example:
* **90% agree** that America’s borders must be secure to protect our sovereignty and our citizens’ safety.
* **88% agree** that government should be limited to maximize personal freedom.
* **85% agree** that parents – not Washington – should be in charge of education.

[SEE MORE RESULTS](http://links.johnshimkus.com/u/click?_t=eae2f3fb948c4b7f93f466c2a8ab140b&_m=7bf735db062543c38d1f00c8f75615ac&_e=G9fFvZpewetnho40WIX391lC4k1TqSJwvi6LbLqWw2VQih_ja10IeFFsjwptCgO5uKaT5kE9ENymJEIKJEMjyJZ-IGzv4wnQIh5vHH_veByBPsoR77QNYhJ6PnS8cvN0puNid3-2LtSbY3Ijcn3Yrzt7vp5cpMQv1v7FRX-tQN1DTuDf_TP3j7u9I1wc5rgidjArTlRs9hP6DZO90y9Hs6YHGejHtUiYTSE4OhenV-xim0r8Gw-7bhKbJlPaiguDWq4rw5LmiTtAFaRwpdzEIX5pzA6NfeBp-xE04OnEv6Ck2Y_hFdE-gk0DoF1LkYZFAJ7bxBqk4mux2i-WFErfe7XXi7_X11s1bThgWjjaRngqQuhDoXorunX11z9TFZgauzcuR7KMFNmExA2I4BPiKPxQ2pAXk1JJ2H0bktgc1Kc%3D)
---

It’s clear that our communities share a commitment to strong conservative values and principles of limited government. With these results finalized, I’m ready to shape _my_ priorities around _yours_.

I’m incorporating your feedback directly into my service in Congress. Be sure to follow along on **[Facebook](http://links.johnshimkus.com/u/click?_t=eae2f3fb948c4b7f93f466c2a8ab140b&_m=7bf735db062543c38d1f00c8f75615ac&_e=G9fFvZpewetnho40WIX390PPMywQeYwOknlH6rqdRlsd0lfiacpV1jyiAl1BIHyzSiHI1w3KqwtGuuBsihMq9x330uF2NZIh2wdpyyVo0duc8n8FAqe5BkDRXEUYnrct06xYCizWf5GZwtNZep25EtEVXW5KR5Bg7186pQfq4VhYvrxgn9qdSqur4R0smoAgKKgvpv1BNhUtpvIp-p9u9rXQU8uzSwryEojULRHeIWMBK74pqqYB5ifaJp3YVRFlI6oWNIsGFlAdMbLlJNIq7lIGj275i0_1_2m3vkzXFoU%3D)** to see exactly how I’m turning your opinions into action.

Sincerely,

John

Paid for by Volunteers for Shimkus.
---
[Unsubscribe](http://links.johnshimkus.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=eae2f3fb948c4b7f93f466c2a8ab140b&_s=7bf735db062543c38d1f00c8f75615ac&_t=AMTFjxF6hzOII3aVci-_gyLKCZtdaGWAuRSG3-133tqvNbX35LTLLxHGHmpfaSIGE12T5g1F7qu1fAjzj9JeOmegE38XhGn-VJGSTxW9QNLmITTL-6UCn3yXuXw5auWbaFbL0TgGjOQC22v34Po0ScUEKhgG0it10bVxmzfbhec%3D)

clean_body: | | | BREAKING news, friends: Molly Kelly is on the ballot to become the next governor of New Hampshire! But now the real work begins. With wealthy special interests bankrolling Chris Sununu here in the Granite State, there's never been more at stake. That's why Molly is refusing to accept any corporate donations. She's accountable to families like yours - not special interests. But that means Molly needs grassroots donors like you to take back the corner office for Democrats in November. We need 1,000 Election Year Members to compete with the special interests of Chris Sununu before tomorrow's deadline, but right now, we're falling short. The only way we'll win in New Hampshire is if grassroots donors like you give right away: "" "" If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Tina Smith
subject: We are the pro-choice majority
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
This time in our history is critical.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-september_choice?refcode=rtw_20180912_em-A&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Friend, the stakes are high for women. Brett Kavanaugh, President Donald Trump's pick to serve on the United States Supreme Court, could be the fifth and decisive vote to overturn Roe vs. Wade -- setting women's rights back generations. This is on top of the current wave of attacks against women's rights to an abortion, birth control, and health care coverage. I take my role as a former volunteer and executive at Planned Parenthood -- and as U.S. Senator -- very seriously in this moment. And I will not shy away from defending a woman's right to reproductive freedom. **But that also means I will face attack upon attack from extremists on the other side -- and they will target me for defeat. If they are successful, that would send a terrible message across the country about the power of our movement.** So I have to make a personal request of you: **[Please make an urgent contribution of $3 or more to my campaign as a way of saying you're ready to fight for women's rights in this pivotal moment in our country's history. I promise, with your support, to do everything in my power to fight for women in the U.S. Senate.](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-september_choice?refcode=rtw_20180912_em-A&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=")** We must defeat Kavanaugh. We must stop each and every attack on women's rights. And we must raise our voices louder than ever before to show that we _are_ the pro-choice majority. There are powerful and wealthy conservative interests seeking to silence our voices. But if all of us stand together, we can be stronger and louder and than any billionaire in the country. Thank you for everything, Tina Smith | **Tina Smith is a fierce progressive running for U.S. Senate in a special election in Minnesota. That 's why Senate Republicans and Donald Trump have made her one of their top targets. She needs your help if she is going to win this tough race. Donate now: ** [CONTRIBUTE](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-september?refcode=rtw_20180912_em-A-biobox&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

name: Eric Chalmers
subject: our strategy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
In running Greg's campaign I have one of the best problems any campaign manager could possibly have - choosing which of Greg's many accomplishments to highlight in his run for Congress. In an era where results-driven leadership is becoming harder to find, Greg has proven he can deliver for the people of our community time and again.

_That is why our latest ad, that 's coming out tomorrow, is a crucial part of our winning strategy. We need to get this message out._

This race is getting tighter every day and we can't win in November unless we reach out to as many voters as possible in the district.

**[Will you make sure we are able to fund this effort by chipping in before midnight tomorrow?](https://act.myngp.com/el/sbwL-rRz0CT4dxW_EfKngTcrBKS2SRLVRBuhWO6Zwv8=/V-iUR5zChkU9W9DVcx52Lo-svuHB-A09DeAgQBOG6tQ=?refcode=X_091218_NewAd_b&amount=25&recurring=auto)**

Thank you!

\-- _Eric Chalmers _
_Campaign Manager for Greg Stanton for Congress _

Paid for by Stanton for Congress

Phoenix AZ 85018 United States

name: Team Lipinski
subject: [policy update] a new attack on our healthcare
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Lipinski for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/_t4UC9ErFz_gBSqW__wmOXzFy2sLvHZ0-IlZob5f8LQ=/XY0KNK4iBpU89juzf79xuB040jsvWWuPDZzqBRcKQdg=)
Peter -- The Republicans have launched a broadside attack against the provisions of the Affordable Care Act that guarantee coverage for pre-existing conditions.

This could be catastrophic and life-threatening for millions of Americans who rely on this insurance for access to medicine and treatment.

[**Dan is racing to stop this attack, but we need you to act fast: Click here to help Dan continue his work for bipartisan solutions to lower healthcare premiums and protect coverage for pre-existing conditions ->**](https://act.myngp.com/el/_t4UC9ErFz_gBSqW__wmOXzFy2sLvHZ0-IlZob5f8LQ=/L8Qsbtan1_1qp98rmuJfKPqym1XDFk8Odts-Rm9R3Os=?refcode=DL_EM_FR_WL_180912_1_1&amount=15&recurring=auto&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=50023&city=Ankeny&state=IA&phone=&occupation=&employer=)

**This lawsuit, brought by 20 GOP states, aims to strike down rules requiring insurers to cover those of us who need health care the most.**

To make matters worse, the Trump administration is refusing to defend the rules in court.

**That means it 's up to us to defend protections for those suffering from pre-existing conditions.**

[DEFEND OUR HEALTH CARE](https://act.myngp.com/el/_t4UC9ErFz_gBSqW__wmOXzFy2sLvHZ0-IlZob5f8LQ=/L8Qsbtan1_1qp98rmuJfKPqym1XDFk8Odts-Rm9R3Os=?refcode=DL_EM_FR_WL_180912_1_1&amount=15&recurring=auto&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=50023&city=Ankeny&state=IA&phone=&occupation=&employer=)
Dan has been working across the aisle to bring down premiums for Americans across the country, but his good work won't make an impact if the Republicans gut the ACA's protections entirely.

[**We need you to take a stand for our health care. Contribute here to help us mobilize everything we have to defend protections for preexisting conditions and keep healthcare affordable ->**](https://act.myngp.com/el/_t4UC9ErFz_gBSqW__wmOXzFy2sLvHZ0-IlZob5f8LQ=/L8Qsbtan1_1qp98rmuJfKPqym1XDFk8Odts-Rm9R3Os=?refcode=DL_EM_FR_WL_180912_1_1&amount=15&recurring=auto&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=50023&city=Ankeny&state=IA&phone=&occupation=&employer=)

Thanks for acting quickly.

Team Lipinski

Thanks for your support of our campaign.

Contributions or gifts to Lipinski for Congress are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Dan Lipinski for Congress

name: Debbie Wasserman Schultz
subject: opponents look at numbers
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|
---
| | You know this about me by now. When Betsy DeVos puts the needs of the NRA before the needs of our students, **I fight back.** When President Trump tries to interfere with the Mueller investigation, **I fight back.** When Republicans in Congress try to repeal affordable health care, defund Planned Parenthood, or destroy Medicare and Social Security -- **I fight back.** **And when I ask all of you to help us reach aggressive goals and keep fighting, you wow me every time.** I need you to do that now. [**We're staring down a very important FEC deadline this month -- the last FEC end-of-quarter deadline of this election. Help us get to our $28,000 goal before it hits. Make a contribution.**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f5c/622b7b5b/1ca724bf/307b6f31/1561961209/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180909?refcode=dwse180909_b&recurring=true&amount=5") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Express Donate: $5](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f5c/622b7b5b/1ca724bf/307b6f30/1561961209/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiI4NjE3NjkiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJkd3NlMTgwOTA5IiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjUiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiYiJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dwse180909?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=dwse180909_b_5&refcode2=861769")** **[Express Donate: $10](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f5c/622b7b5b/1ca724bf/307b6f30/1561961209/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiI4NjE3NjkiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJkd3NlMTgwOTA5IiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjEwIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6ImIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dwse180909?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=dwse180909_b_10&refcode2=861769")** **[Express Donate: $25](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f5c/622b7b5b/1ca724bf/307b6f30/1561961209/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiI4NjE3NjkiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJkd3NlMTgwOTA5IiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjI1IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6ImIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dwse180909?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=dwse180909_b_25&refcode2=861769")** **[Or donate another amount.](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f5c/622b7b5b/1ca724bf/307b6f33/1561961209/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiI4NjE3NjkiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJkd3NlMTgwOTA5IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6ImIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dwse180909?refcode=dwse180909_b_other&refcode2=861769")** When the FEC gets our numbers, it makes them public. That means not only can my opponents see what we've taken in, so can their special interest allies, the Trump administration, the press, and whomever else cares to look. Missing goals can make us look weak -- and what's worse, missing goals actually weakens our ability to keep up our grassroots efforts. And considering we need to get everyone out to vote to help the ticket up and down the ballot, we just can't let that happen. Florida families count on me to be their voice in Washington. I try to live up to that every single day. **Right now, I'm counting on you to reach this goal.** [**Give what you can and help us reach this $28,000 FEC goal.**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f5c/622b7b5b/1ca724bf/307b6f31/1561961209/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180909?refcode=dwse180909_b&recurring=true&amount=5") | | | [Donate Now](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f5c/622b7b5b/1ca724bf/307b6f31/1561961209/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180909?refcode=dwse180909_b&recurring=true&amount=5")
---
Thank you.
Debbie

When we launched this campaign, the political pundits didn’t think a Senate race in Tennessee would be much of a contest. They dismissed the idea that a campaign focused on bringing people together could win out over a DC politician supported by out-of-state billionaires and the Washington establishment.
**We are proving them wrong every single day -- and momentum is on our side.**
Voters on the campaign trail have made it clear what they’re looking for: a leader who is able to bring people together to get things done, and has the record to prove it.
To win in November, we’ve got to keep putting our positive message in front of voters: by opening field offices, knocking on doors, making calls, and airing TV ads that allow Governor Bredesen to speak directly with Tennesseans. Your support is key to getting it done -- that’s why I have to ask:
**Can you chip in $10 or whatever you can today so we have the resources we need to keep this race focused on the issues that matter to Tennesseans? Your support is a big part of why we’re doing so well, and will be critical to keeping this up until Election Day.**

name: =?US-ASCII?Q?The_White_House?=
subject: A message from President Trump on Hurricane Florence
body:
| |
---
The White House • September 12, 2018
## A message from President Trump on Hurricane Florence
##
**This week, three major storms** threaten American communities across an area spanning nearly 5,000 miles: Hurricane Florence (the Southeastern coast), Tropical Storm Olivia (Hawaii), and Tropical Storm Isaac (the Caribbean). **Hurricane Florence in particular** poses a catastrophic threat to millions living in North Carolina, South Carolina, Georgia, and Virginia. The storm is expected to produce total rainfall of 20 to 30 inches, with isolated amounts up to 40 inches. “These numbers are hard to comprehend, but based on past experience, this amount of rain produces life-threatening, catastrophic flooding,” the **[National Weather Service](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTEyLjk0ODIxNjkxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkxMi45NDgyMTY5MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg1NDg5JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://twitter.com/NWS/status/1039907677139292160) **tweeted. **President Donald J. Trump** met with Homeland Security Secretary Kirstjen Nielsen, FEMA Administrator Brock Long, and other senior officials yesterday in the Oval Office to discuss preparations. “Hurricane Florence is setting out to be a devastating event,” Administrator Long said, comparing its potential to Hurricane Hugo in 1989. **The Administration is focused** on helping state leaders and the general public alike before, during, and after the storm makes landfall. “We’re supporting the governors with achieving their life safety evacuation and movements,” Administrator Long said. “We’re focused on mass care and sheltering. And then we’ll be focused on helping them to execute their response and recovery goals.” **Earlier this week, President Trump approved** emergency declarations for [**South** **Carolina**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTEyLjk0ODIxNjkxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkxMi45NDgyMTY5MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg1NDg5JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/president-donald-j-trump-approves-south-carolina-emergency-declaration-2/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) , [**North Carolina**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTEyLjk0ODIxNjkxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkxMi45NDgyMTY5MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg1NDg5JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/president-donald-j-trump-approves-north-carolina-emergency-declaration/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d), and [**Virginia**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTEyLjk0ODIxNjkxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkxMi45NDgyMTY5MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg1NDg5JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/president-donald-j-trump-approves-virginia-emergency-declaration/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d). “I’ve spoken with the governors,” President Trump said yesterday. “They’re prepared. We’re prepared.” **To all Americans** in the path of these storms: Be safe, be ready, and follow the advice of local officials. [**A video message from President Trump: Hurricane Florence is fast approaching.**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTEyLjk0ODIxNjkxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkxMi45NDgyMTY5MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg1NDg5JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&104&&&https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=XZ4w3YYByFA) **For more information and resources, please visit[www.ready.gov](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTEyLjk0ODIxNjkxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkxMi45NDgyMTY5MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg1NDg5JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&105&&&http://www.ready.gov/). **

clean_body: | | The White House • September 12, 2018 A message from President Trump on Hurricane Florence This week, three major storms threaten American communities across an area spanning nearly 5,000 miles: Hurricane Florence (the Southeastern coast), Tropical Storm Olivia (Hawaii), and Tropical Storm Isaac (the Caribbean). Hurricane Florence in particular poses a catastrophic threat to millions living in North Carolina, South Carolina, Georgia, and Virginia. The storm is expected to produce total rainfall of 20 to 30 inches, with isolated amounts up to 40 inches. “These numbers are hard to comprehend, but based on past experience, this amount of rain produces life-threatening, catastrophic flooding,” the tweeted. President Donald J. Trump met with Homeland Security Secretary Kirstjen Nielsen, FEMA Administrator Brock Long, and other senior officials yesterday in the Oval Office to discuss preparations. “Hurricane Florence is setting out to be a devastating event,” Administrator Long said, comparing its potential to Hurricane Hugo in 1989. The Administration is focused on helping state leaders and the general public alike before, during, and after the storm makes landfall. “We’re supporting the governors with achieving their life safety evacuation and movements,” Administrator Long said. “We’re focused on mass care and sheltering. And then we’ll be focused on helping them to execute their response and recovery goals.” Earlier this week, President Trump approved emergency declarations for , , and . “I’ve spoken with the governors,” President Trump said yesterday. “They’re prepared. We’re prepared.” To all Americans in the path of these storms: Be safe, be ready, and follow the advice of local officials. For more information and resources, please visit. Photo of the Day Official White House Photo by Joyce N. Boghosian President Donald J. Trump, joined by Vice President Mike Pence and Secretary of Homeland Security Kirstjen Nielsen, are briefed on Hurricane Florence as it approaches the East Coast | September 11, 2018 | | The White House · 1600 Pennsylvania Avenue, NW · Washington DC 20500 · 202-456-1111

We're experiencing historically low unemployment of 2.7%, and New Hampshire has the largest workforce in state history. Month after month, our budget surplus grows - and we are regaining the New Hampshire Advantage. We cannot give up and let the Democrats destroy our successes. At the Capitol, Eddie Edwards and Steve Negron will work to make tax cuts permanent, expand future economic growth, secure our borders, and support our fighting men and women in uniform. In order to stop the Democrats, we need to activate our grassroot donors in a BIG way. [We're looking for 500 New Hampshire Republicans to donate $10 by this coming Sunday, September 16th, so we can properly #LeadRight into the general election cycle.](http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=3qP3xl6Iy86fMdiFlFopyJ4KY6o2-2BLivwg6sHtRJ3GaXI-2FhdT0NjIGzhp41xzEiD_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30MWKquFOXTe7gLsLoWxrpOEsGf4ZZoIPj0mmYaVdFsGJzSYCt4tG-2BUhoRNEEFq0VGfNQsv-2BiF6ijt-2FHEWC-2Bp9WBy4hv7OzG24S-2Fd-2FN3K6FsCQbTwdNaBKDdbf1qFq2TVeT7PxeNxQ5A47La42ngjJhRjrgPHdwcG9AmfR0zTxYcMTQCtcfdmdhNpdmbVHC6pNQCjjXjaj-2FM7TRDzW8pOF3RqjRJdkB4jkuX2lgJYV2pLQ31-2FnM16wzd7d3GVdxB27Pb76CDk2D5kdvL6AL47A17A-3D-3D) Thank you for your continued dedication to the Republican Party of New Hampshire. clean_body: Derek, Last night, Republican voters did not disappoint in nominating three top candidates for the Republican ticket in November - Governor Sununu, Eddie Edwards and Steve Negron won their primaries. But for us to stop the Democrats in November, We've gotten the job done here in New Hampshire - Granite State Republicans under the leadership of Governor Chris Sununu have lowered taxes, cut regulations, expanded school choice, and created record economic growth. We're experiencing historically low unemployment of 2.7%, and New Hampshire has the largest workforce in state history. Month after month, our budget surplus grows - and we are regaining the New Hampshire Advantage. We cannot give up and let the Democrats destroy our successes. Please help send these conservative New Hampshire solutions to Washington. At the Capitol, Eddie Edwards and Steve Negron will work to make tax cuts permanent, expand future economic growth, secure our borders, and support our fighting men and women in uniform. In order to stop the Democrats, we need to activate our grassroot donors in a BIG way. Thank you for your continued dedication to the Republican Party of New Hampshire. Jim MorganNHGOP Finance Chair | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com Republican Party of New Hampshire 10 Water Street Concord New Hampshire 03301

name: =?utf-8?Q?Ian=20Todd?=
subject: Big debate this weekend!
body:
We just got word this morning that Tom Emmer has agreed to debate on Saturday!

** Debates are on the way!
------------------------------------------------------------
We just got word this morning (yes, just this morning) that Tom Emmer has agreed to debate Ian this Saturday. It won't be aired live so you will have to catch it on KSTP this Sunday afternoon or on their website after it airs. We are also waiting on confirmation for three other candidate forums before the election in November. This is big! People have been asking for Tom to step out into the public eye for nearly two years now, and he is finally coming out because he is scared he might lose his seat in November.

Donate Today (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/iantodd?refcode=debate&amount=100&utm_source=Newsletter&utm_campaign=4569591fde-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2018_09_12_05_36&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_28710cd7a6-4569591fde-9291445)

** Backtracking on Trump
------------------------------------------------------------
All of this news comes just a day after Tom Emmer got on the radio (https://wccoradio.radio.com/articles/news/rep-tom-emmer-talks-trump-wcco-radio-chad-hartman?utm_source=Newsletter&utm_campaign=4569591fde-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2018_09_12_05_36&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_28710cd7a6-4569591fde-9291445) to finally call out some of Trump's bad behavior, saying that his kind of politics makes midwesterners cringe. That sentiment may have something to do with a poll (https://www.npr.org/2018/09/12/646816285/poll-midwest-abandons-trump-fueling-democratic-advantage-for-control-of-congress?utm_source=Newsletter&utm_campaign=4569591fde-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2018_09_12_05_36&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_28710cd7a6-4569591fde-9291445) that just came out that shows Trump losing support in the Midwest.

Our campaign is already succeeding, Tom Emmer is already shifting his focus to appeal to the voters who are unhappy with the lack of forethought that went into the last year policymaking. People want to know that their leaders are thinking ahead and thinking responsibly, with the ballooning deficit and the mismanagement of the DACA situation it is clear that has not been happening in Washington.

Help us keep Tom Emmer on his toes, donate today (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/iantodd?refcode=debate&amount=100&utm_source=Newsletter&utm_campaign=4569591fde-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2018_09_12_05_36&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_28710cd7a6-4569591fde-9291445) so that we can keep fighting for better representation in Washington.

============================================================

clean_body: We just got word this morning that Tom Emmer has agreed to debate on Saturday! Debates are on the way! We just got word this morning (yes, just this morning) that Tom Emmer has agreed to debate Ian this Saturday. It won't be aired live so you will have to catch it on KSTP this Sunday afternoon or on their website after it airs. We are also waiting on confirmation for three other candidate forums before the election in November. This is big! People have been asking for Tom to step out into the public eye for nearly two years now, and he is finally coming out because he is scared he might lose his seat in November. Donate Today () Backtracking on Trump All of this news comes just a day after Tom Emmer got on the radio () to finally call out some of Trump's bad behavior, saying that his kind of politics makes midwesterners cringe. That sentiment may have something to do with a poll () that just came out that shows Trump losing support in the Midwest. Our campaign is already succeeding, Tom Emmer is already shifting his focus to appeal to the voters who are unhappy with the lack of forethought that went into the last year policymaking. People want to know that their leaders are thinking ahead and thinking responsibly, with the ballooning deficit and the mismanagement of the DACA situation it is clear that has not been happening in Washington. Help us keep Tom Emmer on his toes, donate today () so that we can keep fighting for better representation in Washington. ============================================================ () () () () Copyright © 2018 Ian Todd for Congress, All rights reserved.

name: U.S. Senator Bernie Sanders
subject: Sign my petition: Tell the U.S. Senate to reject Brett Kavanaugh’s nomination to the Supreme Court while the president is the subject of an investigation into his campaign’s relationship with the Russian government.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders
body:
If Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump get their way, the U.S. Senate will vote on Brett Kavanaugh’s nomination to serve on the Supreme Court before the end of the month.
#

Sisters and Brothers -
If Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump get their way, the U.S. Senate will vote on Brett Kavanaugh’s nomination to serve on the Supreme Court before the end of the month.
In my view, that would be a grave mistake for our democracy and for the rule of law.
Here is why:
Today in America, we have a president of the United States who is an unindicted co-conspirator in a crime.
His campaign chairman, deputy campaign chairman, national security advisor, foreign policy advisers and his personal lawyer have all pleaded guilty or been convicted of serious crimes.
And it is not a radical idea to say that we should not be confirming a Supreme Court justice picked by Trump who believes the president cannot be indicted or deposed and may actually be the deciding vote on that very question.
Every two years, my colleagues on the Republican side of the aisle like to campaign about the “rule of law” and being “tough on crime.”
But when it comes time to say that no one is above the law in this country, they appear to be willing to turn a blind eye to confirm a Supreme Court nominee who will side with corporations over workers, billionaires who want to buy our elections, radicals who want to take away a woman’s right to make her own health care decisions, and politicians working to suppress people’s right to vote.
The good news is we have the American people on our side. Now we have to go state by state by state to make sure the Senate does what its constituents want. It will be a tough fight, but it is by no means over. So make your voice heard today:
**[Sign my petition: Tell the U.S. Senate to reject Brett Kavanaugh’s nomination to the Supreme Court while the president of the United States is the subject of an investigation into his campaign’s relationship with the Russian government.](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/kavanaugh-petition?source=em180912-full&t=1&akid=142%2E150750%2EgZ4sDP)**
****[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/kavanaugh-petition?source=em180912-full&t=2&akid=142%2E150750%2EgZ4sDP)****
Of course, that is not the only reason to oppose Brett Kavanaugh’s nomination to serve on the Supreme Court.
His confirmation would be a direct threat to:
Abortion rights
Campaign finance reform
Voting rights
Workers rights
Health care
LGBTQ rights
Climate change
Environmental safety
Gun safety
And so much more...
There is also the not insignificant matter of whether or not Judge Kavanaugh lied under oath in past hearings about whether or not he used stolen materials while working in the White House to help advance nominations made by President George W. Bush.
But there's no debating whether or not the president of the United States should be nominating someone who could be the deciding vote on whether or not he is forced to testify as part of the special counsel’s investigation into his campaign’s relationship with the Russian government.
He should not.
Now I need you to add your name if you agree:
**[Sign my petition: Tell the U.S. Senate to reject Brett Kavanaugh’s nomination to the Supreme Court while the president is the subject of an investigation into his campaign’s relationship with the Russian government.](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/kavanaugh-petition?source=em180912-full&t=3&akid=142%2E150750%2EgZ4sDP)**
****[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/kavanaugh-petition?source=em180912-full&t=4&akid=142%2E150750%2EgZ4sDP)****
In these final few weeks before a potential vote, it is incumbent upon all of us to mobilize ourselves and our personal networks to defeat Brett Kavanaugh’s nomination.
Thank you for making your voice heard.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
****[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/kavanaugh-petition?source=em180912-full&t=5&akid=142%2E150750%2EgZ4sDP)****
Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders
PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, [click here to unsubscribe](https://bernie.actionkit.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=6&akid=142%2E150750%2EgZ4sDP). To support Bernie with a contribution, [click here](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=7&akid=142%2E150750%2EgZ4sDP).

_Fall is right around the corner, and so is Election Day._

**With under 60 days to go in our campaign, Team Pence has kicked into high gear.**

Throughout August, we visited fairs, parades, rallies, and small businesses in nearly every county and had the pleasure to speak with Hoosiers about how I’ll fight for our shared Hoosier values and support the Trump-Pence agenda.

[**Curious about where our campaign traveled this past month?
