name: Leah Vukmir
subject: I could go on and on
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leah for Senate
body:
We've got one mission in between now and November: to elect a new senator who can truly represent the Wisconsin Way!

**BRING THE WISCONSIN WAY TO WASHINGTON**

Email: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=68b7ba55a1dd4a489bfb684c36cabba4&_e=fnIfOU4NtIIXAMepjqxUzMqodBXIoOmsv3rE6xRh9tdrN3yH9Ponucj83L18BLvOo2zqigPcb6OtJyVAdid5qO0uSKAeUaT59jTRObBENgf-H--K_vwH6P9gtg1FSVCUR9xPkYVXmYIaFrZQDx4fTMatApDv2uqL2JeCLB0-HQAOQsk3mt6EK-woUy3i54tR5kIfoU59m_c5yPaJadpgWxQOZfY5P9B3BfCbN7nHZxc_syYo1EzwtHBeD-R4fb7wSQQqLvqPiCZXA6l-d374SHTpkhFUc2y-8kuSQh-Dz4wgGd5BroqM5OOoDDsOj3nBE5NMqE9HA6rjLNPbTLhtGE54GBv4L7fT3IoSc9atcbfbKTDXhkpdJZxPKirYnOIvXv1ilMzyIdbc5Fkj46w8O0aqkNKu8-Lkka5RFGuAz_kPPUw2egcnf6iQ_pod3xAI)

Status: **PENDING**

| [CHIP IN $25 TO SUPPORT LEAH](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=68b7ba55a1dd4a489bfb684c36cabba4&_e=fnIfOU4NtIIXAMepjqxUzMqodBXIoOmsv3rE6xRh9tdrN3yH9Ponucj83L18BLvOo2zqigPcb6OtJyVAdid5qO0uSKAeUaT59jTRObBENgf-H--K_vwH6P9gtg1FSVCUR9xPkYVXmYIaFrZQDx4fTMatApDv2uqL2JeCLB0-HQAOQsk3mt6EK-woUy3i54tR5kIfoU59m_c5yPaJadpgW_nPk4Vqu-mE6U5kEf921KO0bKRQQnyeacZ4Sf1_LxlBGge-Ic2wy3JM8eqh2d8QNWlLpSXH7R5GkqmGMrtOo8kZ7yZOdc9lSASLxy9H5nwsC_pRG6Q5tboDH1eYSRvJLvN2hXhuVpcZR6gy14K172ckDxkB_rqO7pQ9rMD2IIjqWrBQMdgTpWTC7OLAgiNz7nUIKVdHB4UUvDh96Po7xwQXggFPLQNiyliuwJPePm4a)
---

Friend,

We've got one mission in between now and November: to elect a new senator who can truly represent the Wisconsin Way!

And the reason why has never been more clear. Tammy Baldwin has extreme views that do NOT represent Wisconsin.

She voted against Judge Gorsuch and wouldn’t even meet with Judge Kavanaugh before announcing she’d vote no on his appointment.

She votes to spend our money recklessly and refuses to support tax cuts for the middle class.

She campaigns for a complete socialized, government takeover of health care.

And let's not forget how she did NOTHING when she learned that a doctor was over prescribing addictive opioids to veterans at the Tomah VA.

I could go on and on. And I don't need to tell you, none of that is the Wisconsin Way.

[BRING THE WISCONSIN WAY TO WASHINGTON](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=68b7ba55a1dd4a489bfb684c36cabba4&_e=fnIfOU4NtIIXAMepjqxUzMqodBXIoOmsv3rE6xRh9tdrN3yH9Ponucj83L18BLvOo2zqigPcb6OtJyVAdid5qO0uSKAeUaT59jTRObBENgf-H--K_vwH6P9gtg1FSVCUR9xPkYVXmYIaFrZQDx4fTMatApDv2uqL2JeCLB0-HQAOQsk3mt6EK-woUy3i54tR5kIfoU59m_c5yPaJadpgWwB-t0K-CfBLL1b0JR3YyiydzSZf3yD5uL5TKpYPVHrGiTzgSOuuFVX6VWmODl_eSyJ-_wAqg75qt9ZpGwYEXjuE70D0b7aa_OQvneUB6kD-gZf_a265oNrRdX6X4PLbm6haQ5BDSP77Xs7roHTZCIfRMOFsV3uys2JQibAhGbuWdA-s4M2ogKcgjf9DkEr77BdXChqPw-Ba63LSPfzWHFIDAG8tM7rX7_oUVde9dTsG)
---

Let's just face it, Tammy Baldwin has let down the people she was elected to represent.

Come November, we've got a chance to send Tammy Baldwin back to the private sector she doesn’t even know exists!

We need a voice in the Senate that doesn’t come from the far left, but comes from the working people who make our state, and our country what it is. Someone who KNOWS the Wisconsin Way.

It's about working hard – and never giving up. It’s about leaving our kids with a world better than the one we received. It's about making sure every person has a voice in our process.

I will be that voice. I’m a mom with a cause, who is here because of circumstance – not ambition. While Tammy Baldwin has abandoned our way, I will fight for it.

But it’s going to take all of us – united – to defeat Tammy.

I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=68b7ba55a1dd4a489bfb684c36cabba4&_e=fnIfOU4NtIIXAMepjqxUzCec6UKW2JM8VrNZC5DCjpb4IHpJ9OQX2ZCq-6f7BgqV2HnEhLLoLCYuzXynFs9CCKSwsKO01rKpD9NHpJDgihO58nL--XDJRINcb1wHjYzn6qfJDOygkne2Vs8s9Wsnv7ZzXnrDULIKRhfGPMTHLVM7GeXyRRdW0Efe4A1Pt-ldxhMEWEHAwjAOsZldstGrphnuUGSo_CP2x77bC40XNUZWgjFFmavKTJ1TDSNq4YomfYhXbGGj2A9z7TCzoM4ScoJB68ZfTcTg9w_N2Xiv9cdJYtdvVZ7VS3W_-aymo5lTcGZ3IuoVBtsBa6Balx9lszDsjfaywqIulmxhNgtja9sIwxu3gWFEayn2nt2FFICH) that you care about? clean_body: We've got one mission in between now and November: to elect a new senator who can truly represent the Wisconsin Way! BRING THE WISCONSIN WAY TO WASHINGTON Email: Status: PENDING | Friend, We've got one mission in between now and November: to elect a new senator who can truly represent the Wisconsin Way! And the reason why has never been more clear. Tammy Baldwin has extreme views that do NOT represent Wisconsin. She voted against Judge Gorsuch and wouldn’t even meet with Judge Kavanaugh before announcing she’d vote no on his appointment. She votes to spend our money recklessly and refuses to support tax cuts for the middle class. She campaigns for a complete socialized, government takeover of health care. And let's not forget how she did NOTHING when she learned that a doctor was over prescribing addictive opioids to veterans at the Tomah VA. I could go on and on. And I don't need to tell you, none of that is the Wisconsin Way. Let's just face it, Tammy Baldwin has let down the people she was elected to represent. Come November, we've got a chance to send Tammy Baldwin back to the private sector she doesn’t even know exists! We need a voice in the Senate that doesn’t come from the far left, but comes from the working people who make our state, and our country what it is. Someone who KNOWS the Wisconsin Way. It's about working hard – and never giving up. It’s about leaving our kids with a world better than the one we received. It's about making sure every person has a voice in our process. I will be that voice. I’m a mom with a cause, who is here because of circumstance – not ambition. While Tammy Baldwin has abandoned our way, I will fight for it. But it’s going to take all of us – united – to defeat Tammy. Now let's go win this thing! -Leah Paid for by Leah for Senate

But my opponents don't see things that way. Gary Johnson and Mick Rich are so extreme that they'd proudly stand with the Trump administration to rollback health care access so they can provide tax breaks to billionaires and special interests, all while claiming that we can't afford to invest in health care.

Now that Gary Johnson is in the race, I'm facing two opponents. The stakes couldn't be higher, and we need this new ad to be seen across New Mexico. Forward this email to friends so they can see the ad too, or share on social media now:

clean_body: | | | | If you were watching TV last night, you may have seen the biggest news with my campaign this week. "" "" I believe that in New Mexico, we take care of each other. But my opponents don't see things that way. Gary Johnson and Mick Rich are so extreme that they'd proudly stand with the Trump administration to rollback health care access so they can provide tax breaks to billionaires and special interests, all while claiming that we can't afford to invest in health care. Now that Gary Johnson is in the race, I'm facing two opponents. The stakes couldn't be higher, and we need this new ad to be seen across New Mexico. Forward this email to friends so they can see the ad too, or share on social media now: "" "" Thanks, Martin "" | PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE Help us spread the word by forwarding this email to 3 friends! name: Team O'Halleran
subject: T-SHIRTS!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
Open this email if you want a T-shirt to show your support for Tom (we know you do!).
Tom O'Halleran is running for Congress in Arizona's 1st district, a critical race to getting Congress back on track. Click here to donate to Tom's campaign and help him put Arizona families first.
[](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633f46/1a8421e1/1a597c9e9/490159e4/1675329349/VEsH/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_header&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
_Team, we 've got some exciting news here at O'Halleran HQ:_ **We 're ordering new CAMPAIGN T-SHIRTS!** **[Team, if you want a T-shirt to show your support for Tom (and we know you do!), chip in $25 or more at the link -- and we'll reach out to you as soon as our next order comes in!](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohallerantshirts?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.12_b1_to_az_TSHIRT&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** [](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633f46/1a8421e1/1a597c9e9/490159e6/1675329349/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohallerantshirts?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.12_b1_to_az_TSHIRTurl&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=") Our campaign team is really happy with these new T-shirts, team (seriously, we've been wearing them around our office since the first batch came in). But we want to make sure the rest of this grassroots team gets to enjoy them, too. After all, you deserve it (your support powers this campaign!). Plus, like yard signs, T-shirts are an easy way to remind voters here in Arizona that Tom is hard at work for us in Congress, and it's a great way to send a clear message that we're going to re-elect him in November. **[so, don't wait -- chip in at the link to claim yours!](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohallerantshirts?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.12_b1_to_az_TSHIRT&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** | ****[Get your T-shirt>>](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohallerantshirts?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.12_b1_to_az_TSHIRT&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")****
---

Thanks,

Team O'Halleran

****[DONATE](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohallerantshirts?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.12_b1_to_az_TSHIRT&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")****

**_**Representative Tom O 'Halleran represents Arizona's First Congressional District in the 115th Congress. As a former police officer, small businessman, and Arizona state legislator, Tom knows what it takes to bring people together and bring positive change to Arizona families. Tom is taking on the tough challenges in Congress by championing ethics reforms and putting problem solving ahead of politics. If you'd like to support Tom's campaign please [click here](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq32018?refcode=footer-bio&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=").**_**

We are looking forward to seeing you tomorrow morning! Sincerely, Todd CheewingNHGOP Executive Director | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com Republican Party of New Hampshire 10 Water Street Concord New Hampshire 03301

Starting tomorrow, my opponent will be working with a group of Washington insiders to launch a new series of ads -- and they’re going to spend and say whatever it takes to drag this race into the mud.
When you chip in to our campaign, you’re giving us the resources we need to take our message of bringing people together to get things done straight to the voters. body:
We'd like to send one of our supporters two tickets to attend a debate with Tim at the end of this month. ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
|

[ ](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f11c2/3e0906/73b5f43e/3e36393a/2073649451/VEsH/ "https://www.timkaine.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=20180912_2_FR_IS_Sweepstakes-1&source=20180912_2_FR_IS_Sweepstakes-1")

| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Derek, we know we have the best supporters. Tim and the team here talk about it all the time, and we're always looking for ways to thank you.

**Well, we have an idea:[We'd like to send one of our supporters two tickets to attend a debate with Tim at the end of this month.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f11c2/3e0906/73b5f43e/3e363939/2073649451/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/va-senate-debate-win?refcode=20180912_2_FR_IS_Sweepstakes-1&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+Wersquod+like+to+send+one+of+our+support&utm_campaign=20180912_2_FR_IS_Sweepstakes-1&source=20180912_2_FR_IS_Sweepstakes-1")**

**This is a great opportunity to meet Tim and Anne, attend this exciting Senate debate, and support Tim in person when he needs it most.**

You have until [the end of the day Friday](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f11c2/3e0906/73b5f43e/3e363938/2073649451/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/va-senate-debate-win?refcode=20180912_2_FR_IS_Sweepstakes-1&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+the+end+of+the+day+Friday&utm_campaign=20180912_2_FR_IS_Sweepstakes-1&source=20180912_2_FR_IS_Sweepstakes-1") to enter before we close the contest and select a winner this weekend. [You can enter as many times as you'd like AND you will be automatically entered when you donate to Tim's campaign through this contest page ->](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f11c2/3e0906/73b5f43e/3e36393f/2073649451/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/va-senate-debate-win?refcode=20180912_2_FR_IS_Sweepstakes-1&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+You+can+enter+as+many+times+as+yoursquod&utm_campaign=20180912_2_FR_IS_Sweepstakes-1&source=20180912_2_FR_IS_Sweepstakes-1")

Tim will love having you there with him, and you'll love having an up-close view as he runs circles around Corey Stewart with his experience, detailed policy plans, and his knowledge (not to mention love and respect) of Virginia and all its residents.

**In summary: Enter by[Friday night at midnight.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f11c2/3e0906/73b5f43e/3e36393e/2073649451/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/va-senate-debate-win?refcode=20180912_2_FR_IS_Sweepstakes-1&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=5+-+Friday+night+at+midnight&utm_campaign=20180912_2_FR_IS_Sweepstakes-1&source=20180912_2_FR_IS_Sweepstakes-1") Any amount donated will get you entered. You can enter on the below contest page ->** | | [**ENTER TO WIN TICKETS HERE**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f11c2/3e0906/73b5f43e/3e36393d/2073649451/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/va-senate-debate-win?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=20180912_2_FR_IS_Sweepstakes-1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=6+-+ENTER+TO+WIN+TICKETS+HERE&utm_campaign=20180912_2_FR_IS_Sweepstakes-1&source=20180912_2_FR_IS_Sweepstakes-1")

name: Team Menendez
subject: (Video) You deserve to know what Bob Hugin did, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Menendez for Senate
body:
Friend,

While serving as CEO of Celgene, Bob Hugin was sued by the Department of Justice for putting cancer patients in danger by hiding information about potentially fatal side effects.

But that's not all. The Department of Justice also claimed Hugin's company defrauded taxpayers of millions of dollars in 28 states and the District of Columbia.

Hugin's actions were so deceitful, the United States Attorney's Office forced Hugin's company to pay a massive $280 million settlement. If Bob Hugin's company put cancer patients in danger and falsified claims to make millions, what do you think he's willing to do to mislead New Jerseyans?

[**Take a look at our latest TV ad, then chip in $3 or more right now to help us make sure every New Jersey voter knows they can't trust Bob Hugin to be on their side.**](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846ccc/3af3c5d/3ad99bec/4ec3d700/1212331879/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez_ad3?gpsid=5_73_3541&refcode=em18_180912_Ad3_fnd_gq_cust__TM_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180912_Ad3_fnd_gq_cust__TM_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=1+-+Take+a+look+at+our+latest+TV+ad+then+chi")

name: Kathy Manning
subject: Hurricane Florence
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
|
---

| | This week, families across North Carolina are bracing for Hurricane Florence, team. We want to make sure that you and your family are safe from the storm. Here are a few tips and resources you might find helpful: **1\. Listen to authorities.** If you're in an evacuation zone, don't stick around. It's not worth the risk. You can check [**ReadyNC.org**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/654279b5/e3b7d3/5d71042d/2555446a/2785736663/VEsH/ "https://readync.org/EN/Index.html") to see warnings in your area. **2\. Know what's going on.** Take a look at [**ReadyNC.org**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/654279b5/e3b7d3/5d71042d/2555446a/2785736663/VEsE/ "https://readync.org/EN/Index.html") or download the ReadyNC app to get the latest updates on the storm and what North Carolina communities are doing to prepare. **3\. Be prepared.** The importance of this cannot be overstated.
* Check to see if your area is at high risk for flooding with the [**North Carolina Flood Risk Information System.**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/654279b5/e3b7d3/5d71042d/25554469/2785736663/VEsF/ "https://fris.nc.gov/fris/Home.aspx?ST=NC")
* See how to [**make a hurricane preparedness toolkit**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/654279b5/e3b7d3/5d71042d/25554468/2785736663/VEsC/ "https://www.ready.gov/build-a-kit") with all the supplies you might need.

**4\. Be proactive.**
* If your utilities go out, [**report the outage.**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/654279b5/e3b7d3/5d71042d/2555446f/2785736663/VEsD/ "https://readync.org/en/Recover_Utilities.html")
* If you have to drive, don't leave the house without [**checking road conditions.**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/654279b5/e3b7d3/5d71042d/2555446e/2785736663/VEsA/ "https://tims.ncdot.gov/tims/")

And most important: **Be safe.** Kathy
---

|
---
| | Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
---

name: Sen. Joe Donnelly
subject: quicker than you can say "mega-rich Republican donors"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Catherine Cortez Masto for Senate
body:
**BRAND-NEW NBC/MARIST POLL:
"Democrat Joe Donnelly has slight edge in Indiana Senate race"**
Friends, we're at a turning point in the race to protect our Democratic values in the Senate, so I'll get straight to it: [**Will you donate to help me push back against extremist Republican attacks?**](https://ssl.catherinecortezmasto.com/page/m/1a9e5614/688a0c21/567ab2be/73af2b79/2215437671/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiY2NtNGpkIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJqdGsxOTUxLWJ1LW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ccm4jd?refcode=jtk1951-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
I know that, just like Hoosiers, Nevada voters want to make sure folks with preexisting conditions can still get affordable health care, and they want a tax system that helps the middle class. Along with my colleague and friend Sen. Cortez Masto, I'm continuing to fight for these issues with everything I have in the Senate.
And with fewer than eight weeks until Election Day, a new poll shows I have a _slight_ edge in my reelection race.
**But if we 're not careful, our small lead could disappear quicker than you can say "mega-rich Republican donors."** They're going to respond to this poll by dumping even more cash into our race - on top of the millions they've already spent. [**Can you make a quick donation to help me fight back?**](https://ssl.catherinecortezmasto.com/page/m/1a9e5614/688a0c21/567ab2be/73af2b79/2215437671/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiY2NtNGpkIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJqdGsxOTUxLWJ1LW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ccm4jd?refcode=jtk1951-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
Right-wing Republican bigwigs are going all out to replace me. They've handpicked a far-right extremist who wants to gut our health care and give away more of our tax dollars to the wealthiest Americans like himself. He'll be a yes-man for whatever President Trump asks.
But we can stop him. In 2012, our campaign beat the cynics by going door to door in every Indiana community with a positive vision for how to move our country forward. We can do it again this year. No matter how much they spend to take me down, I won't stop working to stand up for the people of Indiana and America.
Friends, the attacks keep coming, so I have to ask: Can you make a donation at this link? **[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ccm4jd](https://ssl.catherinecortezmasto.com/page/m/1a9e5614/688a0c21/567ab2be/73af2b79/2215437671/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiY2NtNGpkIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJqdGsxOTUxLWJ1LW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ccm4jd?refcode=jtk1951-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Thanks,
Joe Donnelly
U.S. Senator from Indiana

clean_body: BRAND-NEW NBC/MARIST POLL: "Democrat Joe Donnelly has slight edge in Indiana Senate race" Friends, we're at a turning point in the race to protect our Democratic values in the Senate, so I'll get straight to it: "" I know that, just like Hoosiers, Nevada voters want to make sure folks with preexisting conditions can still get affordable health care, and they want a tax system that helps the middle class. Along with my colleague and friend Sen. Cortez Masto, I'm continuing to fight for these issues with everything I have in the Senate. And with fewer than eight weeks until Election Day, a new poll shows I have a slight edge in my reelection race. But if we 're not careful, our small lead could disappear quicker than you can say "mega-rich Republican donors." They're going to respond to this poll by dumping even more cash into our race - on top of the millions they've already spent. "" Right-wing Republican bigwigs are going all out to replace me. They've handpicked a far-right extremist who wants to gut our health care and give away more of our tax dollars to the wealthiest Americans like himself. He'll be a yes-man for whatever President Trump asks. But we can stop him. In 2012, our campaign beat the cynics by going door to door in every Indiana community with a positive vision for how to move our country forward. We can do it again this year. No matter how much they spend to take me down, I won't stop working to stand up for the people of Indiana and America. Friends, the attacks keep coming, so I have to ask: Can you make a donation at this link? "" Thanks, Joe Donnelly U.S. Senator from Indiana ""

name: ZephyrForNY.com
subject: Will you ask your friends to vote for Zephyr?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zephyr for NY
body:
#
Peter -
Tomorrow is the day we've all been working toward. The polls open, and we get to make our voices heard by voting for Zephyr Teachout for Attorney General.
In the months since Zephyr launched this campaign, we've continued to surge -- picking up a huge number of endorsements, including from the New York Times, Bernie Sanders and Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, along the way. Now we're on the verge of winning.
I hope you've made your plan to vote and are as excited as I am about casting your ballot for Zephyr. As we wait for polls to open, there's one more unique way you can help us -- reach out to your friends and family and ask them to vote for Zephyr as well.
We know that one-to-one conversations (whether by phone, email or text) are the best way to reach voters, but the message is even more effective when it comes from someone you already know and trust.
There are a lot of reasons people are supporting Zephyr -- whether it's her anti-corruption expertise or the fact that she'll stand up to Donald Trump (as she did when she sued him on day three of his administration) or that she's the only AG candidate who has rejected all corporate donations and will be totally independent of Albany's political machine.
Everyone has their own reason. So take a moment and think about yours. Then forward this email to a friend, share why you're voting for Zephyr and ask them to make a plan to vote as well.
Here's a link so they can confirm they're registered to vote and find their polling location:
**[https://voterlookup.elections.ny.gov/](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780961/6e822e2f/1d3a61b5/4173be1c/679551469/VEsH/ "https://voterlookup.elections.ny.gov/")**
We've got the momentum to win this, and if we all work together in these final hours, I know that we can. And winning this race means getting justice for the people of our state. It means we will have a truly independent champion in Albany ready to root out corruption, protect our air and water, end mass incarceration, and be a firewall against the lawlessness of the Trump administration.
Thank you in advance for talking to your friends about Zephyr.
All my best,
Dan Torres
Campaign Manager
Zephyr for NY
[FIND YOUR POLLING LOCATION](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780961/6e822e2f/1d3a61b5/4173be1c/679551469/VEsE/ "https://voterlookup.elections.ny.gov/")

* * *
Paid for by Zephyr for NY
---
1789 Madison Ave, New York, NY 10035

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Click [here](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780961/6e822e2f/1d3a61b5/4173be1d/679551469/VEsF/ "http://zephyr.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/") if you'd like to unsubscribe. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email. To support Zephyr with a contribution, click [here](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780961/6e822e2f/1d3a61b5/4173be1e/679551469/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-for-ny?refcode=em_footer").

[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e62a6/51dbcc2a/1d8f1042/3a88b38/2743567136/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/") Team:

We're less than two months away from Election Day, and the Senate majority is still a toss-up. _CNN_ just laid out the narrow path to a Democratic majority, and it requires a win right here in Pennsylvania.

**_[In order to take back the Senate, we need to keep Pennsylvania's only Democratic Senate seat blue -- donate $5 or more to defend Bob Casey today.](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180912_fr1_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

There have been a lot of articles this year about how important the midterm elections will be, but this one made it clear: Democrats can't win control of the Senate if Bob loses. Without a Senate majority, Democrats won't be able to fight the president's unqualified nominees, protect affordable health care or prevent Republicans from gutting Social Security and Medicare.

**In order to put a stop to this administration's anti-middle-class agenda, we need to win back the Senate majority -- that means protecting every single Democrat up for re-election this year.
